hooks.command: notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude needs your approval' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/window-question.oga 2>/dev/null; grep -qx 1 ~/.claude/telegram_notifications_enabled 2>/dev/null && ~/scripts/sendToTelegramViaBot.sh 'Claude needs your approval' 2>/dev/null; true

notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude has responded' 2>/dev/null; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/complete.oga 2>/dev/null; grep -qx 1 ~/.claude/telegram_notifications_enabled 2>/dev/null && ~/scripts/sendToTelegramViaBot.sh 'Claude has responded' 2>/dev/null; true
